plugin.quickCapture.modal.title: Quick Capture
plugin.quickCapture.disclosure.title: Prepare Quick Capture suggestions?
plugin.quickCapture.disclosure.message: Your original capture is already saved. To prepare Memory or possible-task suggestions, this capture text may be sent to your configured AI provider and may use AI credits. Only suggestions that need later confirmation are kept for review, and nothing changes your note unless you accept a later action.
plugin.insightsViewer.title: AI Insights
plugin.insightsViewer.noInsights: No insights available yet. Enable AI Memory Extraction and have a few conversations to start building your profile.
plugin.notice.metadataCommandDisabled: update metadata command is not enabled in setting tab
plugin.notice.qwenMemoryModelRecommended: Qwen's newer memory model is recommended for new memory copies. Your existing memory model setting was preserved.
plugin.notice.apiTokenMigrationFailed: API token migration failed. Please re-enter your token in Settings.
plugin.notice.apiTokenNotConfigured: API token not configured. Please set it in Settings → Personal Assistant.
plugin.aiSetup.chooseProvider: Choose an AI provider in Settings first.

plugin.memory.diagnostics.title: Memory diagnostics
plugin.memory.diagnostics.inProgressNote: Full diagnostics will be available when the current Memory action finishes.
plugin.memory.diagnostics.performance100: Performance note: exact search may be slow above 100k chunks; consider a future quantized or ANN backend, which is not enabled automatically.
plugin.memory.diagnostics.performance50k: Performance note: exact search may be slower above 50k chunks.
plugin.memory.confirm.reset.title: Reset local memory copy?
plugin.memory.confirm.reset.message: Your notes will not be changed or deleted. This device may need to prepare Memory again before using it.
plugin.memory.approval.title.localMissin: Prepare memory again on this device?
plugin.memory.approval.title.settingsCha: Prepare memory again for the new AI settings?
plugin.memory.approval.intro: The assistant can use Memory from your notes when answering.
plugin.memory.approval.section.data.body: Your notes will not be changed or deleted.
To prepare memory, note text may be sent to your configured AI provider.
plugin.memory.approval.section.search.bo: When Memory is ready, your question may be sent to your configured AI provider to search Memory. This does not send all note text.
plugin.memory.approval.section.backgroun: After Memory is prepared, changed note text may be sent to your configured AI provider while updates continue in the background. You can turn this off in Advanced memory controls.
plugin.memory.approval.section.cost.body: This may use AI credits or API calls. Unchanged notes will be skipped when possible.
plugin.memory.notice.unavailableAnswerNo: Memory is unavailable. I will answer normally for now.
plugin.memory.notice.updatedPartial: Memory was updated, but some notes were skipped.
plugin.memory.notice.readyPartial: Memory is ready, but some notes were skipped.
plugin.memory.notice.prepareAgainLater: This device may need to prepare memory again later.
plugin.memory.notice.readyNotesUnchanged: Memory is ready. Your notes were not changed.
plugin.memory.notice.unavailableAskNorma: Memory is unavailable. You can still ask normally.
plugin.memory.notice.notReadyPrepareFirs: Memory is not ready. Prepare memory first.
plugin.memory.notice.actionAlreadyRunnin: A Memory action is already running.
plugin.memory.notice.needsPrepareAgain: Memory needs to be prepared again on this device.
plugin.memory.message.prepareFailedAnswe: I could not prepare memory this time, so I answered normally.
plugin.memory.message.usingLastPrepared: Memory is using the last prepared copy while updates continue in the background.
plugin.memory.message.backgroundUnavaila: Memory is using the last prepared copy. Background updates are unavailable until memory is prepared again on this device.
plugin.memory.message.notUsed: Memory was not used for this answer.
plugin.memory.error.localStorageBusy: Could not prepare memory because local storage is busy. Close other Obsidian windows for this vault, then try again.
plugin.memory.error.prepareFailedAnswerN: Could not prepare memory. I will answer normally for now.
plugin.memory.legacy.cleanup.onlyReady: Old memory cache cleanup is available only after diagnostic status is ready.
plugin.memory.legacy.cleanup.notSafelyRe: Old memory cache was not cleaned because diagnostic status is not safely ready.
plugin.memory.legacy.cleanup.stateNotSaf: Old memory cache was not cleaned because diagnostic state is not safely ready.
plugin.memory.legacy.cleanup.noneFound: No old memory cache files found.
plugin.memory.legacy.cleanup.title: Delete old Memory cache files?
plugin.memory.legacy.cleanup.message: Delete {count} old memory cache files ({bytes})? Notes will not be changed or deleted.
plugin.memory.legacy.cleanup.stateChange: Old memory cache was not cleaned because diagnostic state changed.
plugin.settings.dataBoundary.title: Data & Privacy Boundaries
plugin.settings.dataBoundary.desc: Choose which notes PA can use for Memory, Pagelet review, and provider-backed suggestions.
plugin.settings.dataBoundary.excludedFol: Comma-separated vault folders PA should skip unless a run is explicitly adjusted.
plugin.settings.dataBoundary.excludedTag: Comma-separated tag names PA should skip unless a run is explicitly adjusted.
plugin.settings.dataBoundary.generatedNo: Choose whether PA-generated notes can be used as sources.
plugin.settings.dataBoundary.providerDis: PA asks before broad, sensitive, costly, Memory, Pagelet, weekly, maintenance, or excluded-override runs send note text to your configured AI provider.
plugin.settings.retrievalHabit.title: Local recall preferences
plugin.settings.retrievalHabit.desc: PA can adapt recall using local interaction patterns in this vault. This stays on this device, is weak influence only, and can be cleared or turned off.
plugin.settings.retrievalHabit.enabled.d: Use aggregate choices such as kept recalls or source types to gently order comparable results. No provider call, sync, export, or note write is allowed.
plugin.settings.retrievalHabit.enableCon: PA will keep only local aggregate interaction patterns for this vault. Your notes will not be modified, nothing is sent to an AI provider for these local recall preferences, and they can be cleared or turned off.
plugin.settings.retrievalHabit.clear.des: Delete the local aggregate recall preferences. This does not change notes, Memory, or Saved Insights.
plugin.settings.retrievalHabit.clearConf: This deletes the local aggregate recall preferences on this device. Your notes, Memory, and Saved Insights are not changed.
plugin.settings.dataBoundary.cleanup.des: Cleanup groups are shown here so future actions stay explicit. Disabled groups do not delete anything.
plugin.settings.dataBoundary.cleanup.cac: Local generated cache data. Clearing this must not change or delete notes.
plugin.settings.dataBoundary.cleanup.que: Kept items and action-confirmation items. Cleanup is disabled until the queue store exists.
plugin.settings.dataBoundary.cleanup.rep: Audit metadata without raw private excerpts. Cleanup is disabled until replay storage exists.
plugin.settings.dataBoundary.cleanup.can: Unconfirmed suggestions or Memory Candidates. Cleanup is disabled until candidate storage exists.
plugin.settings.dataBoundary.cleanup.con: User-confirmed Memory requires explicit confirmation before cleanup can be implemented.
plugin.settings.dataBoundary.cleanup.tom: Forgetting markers require explicit governance before cleanup can be implemented.
plugin.settings.quickCapture.title: Quick Capture
plugin.settings.quickCapture.desc: Save a thought first; optional suggestions can come later after you enable them.
plugin.settings.quickCapture.enabled.des: Adds the PA: Quick Capture command for saving raw notes without AI.
plugin.settings.quickCapture.destination: Choose where original captures are appended.
plugin.settings.quickCapture.inboxPath.d: Used when Quick Capture saves to Inbox. Captures append to this rolling note.
plugin.settings.quickCapture.postProcess: After the original capture is saved, PA can prepare Memory or possible-task suggestions. Capture text may be sent to your configured AI provider after disclosure; only suggestions that need confirmation are kept for review.
plugin.focusMode.enabled: Focus Mode enabled — all PA suggestions paused.
plugin.focusMode.disabled: Focus Mode disabled — PA suggestions resumed.
plugin.settings.statistics.title: Vault Statistics
plugin.settings.statistics.show.name: Show Statistics
plugin.settings.statistics.show.desc: Choose the default statistics dashboard view
plugin.settings.statistics.sync.name: Sync statistics history across devices
plugin.settings.statistics.sync.desc: Creates Statistics history files inside this plugin's vault folder so writing history can sync across devices. Leave off to avoid ongoing Git changes from synced history.
plugin.settings.statistics.sync.error: Could not change Statistics sync setting. Your notes are not affected.
plugin.settings.statistics.sectionCounts: Display word counts under each heading while editing.
plugin.settings.statistics.countComments: Include text inside HTML and Obsidian comments in word and character counts.
plugin.settings.ai.title: AI Assistant
plugin.settings.ai.desc: AI Helper supports Qwen, OpenAI, and other OpenAI-compatible providers.
plugin.settings.ai.provider.name: AI Provider
plugin.settings.ai.provider.desc: Select the AI service provider. Presets fill recommended defaults; you can edit the URL and models after switching.
plugin.settings.ai.provider.switch.title: Switch AI provider?
plugin.settings.ai.provider.switch.custo: Switching to Custom keeps your current Base URL, chat model, and Memory model so you can edit them manually. Your API token is kept but may need to be replaced.
plugin.settings.ai.provider.switch.prese: Switching providers replaces your Base URL, chat model, and Memory model with that preset's defaults. You can edit them afterward. Your API token is kept but may need to be replaced.
plugin.settings.ai.provider.prompt: Choose an AI provider above to configure your API token, base URL, and model.
plugin.settings.ai.apiToken.name: API Token
plugin.settings.ai.apiToken.desc: Stored securely in your OS keychain (macOS Keychain / iOS Keychain / Windows Credential Manager). Clear the field to remove it.
plugin.settings.ai.apiToken.remove.title: Remove API token?
plugin.settings.ai.apiToken.remove.messa: This will remove the API token stored in your OS keychain for Personal Assistant. Existing notes and settings are not changed.
plugin.settings.ai.baseUrl.name: Base URL
plugin.settings.ai.baseUrl.desc: API base URL for the selected provider
plugin.settings.ai.chatModel.name: Chat Model Name
plugin.settings.ai.chatModel.desc: Name of the AI model to use
plugin.settings.ai.policyModel.name: Policy model name
plugin.settings.ai.policyModel.desc: Optional router model for Memory/WebSearch decisions. Sends your request and explicit context to your AI provider; hidden vault content is not sent. Blank uses local fallback rules.
plugin.settings.qwen.title: Qwen response options
plugin.settings.qwen.thinking.name: Show Qwen model thinking
plugin.settings.qwen.thinking.desc: Show the model thinking text returned by DashScope in this chat session. It is not added to the final answer, notes, or Memory.
plugin.settings.qwen.webSearch.name: Enable builtin WebSearch tool
plugin.settings.qwen.webSearch.desc: Allow PA Agent to call the read-only builtin WebSearch tool. Search queries may be sent to DashScope WebSearch MCP and can produce web sources.
plugin.settings.advanced.title: Advanced
plugin.settings.advanced.debug.name: Debug
plugin.settings.advanced.debug.desc: Print plugin diagnostics to the developer console.
plugin.settings.advanced.shareUsage.name: Share anonymous capability usage
plugin.settings.advanced.shareUsage.desc: Share local PA Agent usage events for capability invoked, failed, skipped, or unavailable states. Events do not include prompts, note text, observations, or vault paths.
plugin.settings.legal.title: Legal / About
plugin.settings.legal.desc: Source, license, notices, and network disclosure for version {version}.
plugin.settings.legal.source.name: Source code
plugin.settings.legal.source.desc: Exact GitHub release tag for this version.
plugin.settings.legal.sourceArchive.name: Source archive
plugin.settings.legal.sourceArchive.desc: Downloadable source archive for the exact release tag.
plugin.settings.legal.license.name: License
plugin.settings.legal.license.desc: AGPL-3.0-only license text for the client source starting with version 2.8.0.
plugin.settings.legal.notice.name: Notices
plugin.settings.legal.notice.desc: Copyright, source availability, commercial boundary, and brand reservation notices.
Runtime dependency notices, including bundled SQLite/WASM assets.
plugin.settings.legal.networkPrivacy.des: The README disclosure for data sent to AI providers and external services.
plugin.settings.skills.title: Skill guides
plugin.settings.skills.desc: Let the assistant use bundled read-only skill guides for Obsidian formats and vault review tasks.
plugin.settings.skills.enabled.name: Use skill guides
plugin.settings.skills.enabled.desc: Skill guides add bounded reference context to chat answers. They do not add tools, write notes, run commands, or change Memory.
plugin.settings.skills.selector.name: Enabled skill guides
plugin.settings.skills.selector.desc: Choose which guides the assistant may use. Current: {summary}.
plugin.settings.memory.title: Memory
plugin.settings.memory.desc: Let the assistant use memory from your notes when answering.
plugin.settings.memory.enabled.name: Use memory from my notes
plugin.settings.memory.enabled.desc: The assistant asks before preparing Memory. After you approve and Memory is ready, changed notes may update in the background while the app is open.
plugin.settings.memory.askCredits.name: Ask before using AI credits
plugin.settings.memory.askCredits.desc: The assistant will ask for your approval before preparing or updating Memory, which uses API calls.
Show maintenance and diagnostic controls for the local memory copy.
plugin.settings.memory.background.name: Keep memory updated in background
plugin.settings.memory.background.desc: After memory has been prepared, update changed notes automatically while the app is open. Changed note text may be sent to your configured AI provider.
plugin.settings.memory.background.title: Keep memory updated in background?
plugin.settings.memory.background.messag: Your notes will not be changed or deleted. Changed note text may be sent to your configured AI provider to prepare Memory. AI credits or API calls may be used; unchanged notes are skipped when possible.
plugin.settings.memory.model.name: Memory model
plugin.settings.memory.model.desc: Advanced: model used to prepare memory from notes.
plugin.settings.memory.update.name: Update memory now
plugin.settings.memory.rebuild.name: Rebuild memory on this device
plugin.settings.memory.rebuild.desc: Prepare memory again for this device. Your notes will not be changed or deleted.
plugin.settings.memory.reset.name: Reset local memory copy
plugin.settings.memory.reset.desc: Remove this device's local memory copy. Your notes will not be deleted.
plugin.settings.memory.deleteCache.name: Delete old Memory cache files
plugin.settings.memory.deleteCache.desc: Delete old Memory cache files after Memory is ready. Your notes will not be deleted.
plugin.settings.memory.excludePath.name: Memory Exclude Path
plugin.settings.memory.excludePath.desc: Exclude note folders from memory. Separate paths with commas.

plugin.settings.graphColors.colorDesc: This will be the Color used in the graph view.

plugin.settings.metadata.descPrefix:
Auto updating metadata in frontmatter when file is modified.
Timestamp format follows `moment.js` and syntax details,

plugin.settings.metadata.excludePath.des: Exclude files in the directory to update metadata
plugin.settings.featuredImage.path.name: Featured image folder
plugin.settings.featuredImage.path.desc: Where generated featured images are saved in your vault.
plugin.settings.featuredImage.model.name: Featured image model
plugin.settings.featuredImage.model.desc: Balanced uses Wan 2.7 Image for daily 2K featured images. Quality uses Wan 2.7 Image Pro and may take longer.
plugin.settings.featuredImage.count.name: Images per run
plugin.settings.featuredImage.count.desc: How many images to generate each time. Billing is based on successfully generated images. Existing saved values are preserved.

plugin.settings.apiToken.modal.id.name: ID
plugin.settings.apiToken.modal.id.desc: Vault-scoped secret ID used by Personal Assistant.
plugin.settings.apiToken.modal.secret.de: Stored in your OS keychain. Leave empty and save to remove it.
plugin.qwen.desc.dashScope: Qwen thinking and builtin WebSearch require Alibaba Cloud DashScope. They do not change Memory from your notes.
plugin.qwen.desc.nonDashScope: Qwen thinking and builtin WebSearch are available only with the DashScope OpenAI-compatible base URL.

plugin.modal.batch.failed: Failed to update {count} {pluginWord}, try it again
plugin.theme.networkIssue: Got a network issue when accessing github.com
plugin.theme.filesUpdated: Theme files updated. Switch themes or restart Obsidian to apply.

plugin.callout.noEditableNoClipboard: No editable markdown file and clipboard is unavailable

plugin.mermaid.sourceWarning: Mermaid diagram could not be rendered; showing source.
plugin.statistics.title: {vault} Statistics
plugin.statistics.issue.one: {count} Statistics history issue needs attention. Some writing history could not be loaded, so this view may be incomplete. Your notes are not affected.
plugin.statistics.issue.other: {count} Statistics history issues need attention. Some writing history could not be loaded, so this view may be incomplete. Your notes are not affected.

plugin.ai.notice.invalidSummary: AI returned an invalid summary response.
plugin.ai.notice.featuredUnsupported: Featured image generation requires a supported DashScope Qwen endpoint.
plugin.ai.notice.featuredTimeout: AI featured image generation timed out. Try again with fewer images or the balanced model.
plugin.ai.notice.imageTaskFailed: Failed to get image: Task did not succeed or timed out.
plugin.memoryExtraction.enabledNotice: AI Memory Extraction is enabled. Your AI model analyzes conversations in the background to learn your preferences (API costs apply). You can disable this in Settings.
plugin.memoryExtraction.settings.enabled: After explicit confirmation, extract user preferences from conversations and prepare vault insights using your configured AI model. API costs may apply and generated memory is stored locally.
plugin.memoryExtraction.settings.enableC: Conversation content may be sent to your configured AI provider. AI credits or API calls may be used. Extracted memories are stored locally and used in future AI context.
plugin.memoryExtraction.settings.viewIns: Open the current user profile and vault insights generated by AI Memory Extraction.
plugin.memoryExtraction.settings.include: Include Vault Insights in AI Context
Share vault structure overview (folders, tags, link topology) with the AI to improve context-aware answers.
plugin.memoryExtraction.vaultInsightsInj: PA now shares your vault structure overview with the AI to improve answers. This adds a small amount to each prompt. You can disable this in Settings > Memory.
plugin.settings.operationsAgent.name: Operations Agent Mode (Beta)
plugin.settings.operationsAgent.desc: Enable AI to append content to your active note after preview and confirmation. Requires explicit approval for each action.
